channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Metro 2039 Story Leaks Ahead of Xbox First Look Reveal - Insider Gaming
item.description:
1. Metro 2039 Story Leaks Ahead of Xbox First Look Reveal  Insider Gaming
  2. Tune in on Thursday for Xbox First Look: Metro 2039  Xbox Wire
  3. Metro 2039 Announced With A Full Reveal Set For This Thursday  Game Informer
  4. Metro Author Promises 2039 ‘Will Be Darker Than Anything You’ve Seen’  Insider Gaming
  5. Metro Games Go on Huge Sale Ahead of Metro 2039’s Reveal  VICE

item.title: iPhone 18 Pro Deep Red Color Likely as Android Rivals Prep Same Shade - MacRumors
item.description:
1. iPhone 18 Pro Deep Red Color Likely as Android Rivals Prep Same Shade  MacRumors
  2. 10 Reasons to Wait for the iPhone 18 Pro  MacRumors
  3. Apple iPhone 18 Pro Latest Leak Signals Significant Design Change  Forbes
  4. This fall’s iPhone 18 launch lineup has one big wildcard remaining  9to5Mac
  5. Seeing red: Another leaker jumps on the crimson iPhone 18 Pro bandwagon  AppleInsider

item.title: Warhammer Classics label announced, reviving and debuting classic games on Steam - Gematsu
item.description:
1. Warhammer Classics label announced, reviving and debuting classic games on Steam  Gematsu
  2. Warhammer Classics brings legendary games back to your PC  Warhammer Community
  3. Games Workshop brings seven classic Warhammer games to Steam for the first time  Engadget
  4. More than 20 classic Warhammer and WH40K games just came to Steam, 7 of them for the first time ever  PC Gamer
  5. You Can Now Relive the Golden Age of ‘Warhammer’ PC Games  Gizmodo

item.title: Xbox CEO called Game Pass 'too expensive for players' in a leaked memo - Engadget
item.description:
1. Xbox CEO called Game Pass 'too expensive for players' in a leaked memo  Engadget
  2. Xbox Game Pass ‘has become too expensive,’ says Microsoft’s new gaming chief in leaked memo  The Verge
  3. 6 months after hiking Game Pass prices by 50%, Xbox determines it may be too expensive  Sherwood News
  4. Microsoft considers lowering Xbox Game Pass, memo says: report  Seeking Alpha
  5. Xbox boss reportedly says Game Pass "has become too expensive for players"  GamesIndustry.biz

item.title: Apple is making AI glasses, report claims - The Independent
item.description:
1. Apple is making AI glasses, report claims  The Independent
  2. Apple AI Glasses Will Rival Meta’s With Several Styles, Oval Cameras  Bloomberg.com
  3. Report: Apple’s upcoming smartglasses to come in up to four different frame styles  Macworld
  4. Apple's AI smart glasses strategy revealed: How the iPhone maker plans to outshine Meta's Ray-Bans  Tom's Guide
  5. Will Apple’s Smart Glasses Come With a Ring Light Around the Camera?  PetaPixel

item.title: Apple’s iPhone Fold Set for September 2026 Launch: Everything We Know - Geeky Gadgets
item.description:
1. Apple’s iPhone Fold Set for September 2026 Launch: Everything We Know  Geeky Gadgets
  2. Apple’s Foldable iPhone Remains on Track for September Debut (AAPL)  Bloomberg.com
  3. New report explains how Apple will solve the iPhone Fold’s crease problem  Macworld
  4. It might be really hard to get an iPhone Fold at launch  9to5Mac
  5. Apple’s Entry into Foldable Smartphones Could Capture Approximately 20% Market Share; Stress Management Emerges as the Key to Reducing Creases, Says TrendForce  TrendForce

item.title: Bethesda Addresses Starfield’s PS5 Performance Issues and Crashes - Insider Gaming
item.description:
1. Bethesda Addresses Starfield’s PS5 Performance Issues and Crashes  Insider Gaming
  2. Starfield has sold 140K copies on PS5  The Alinea Insight newsletter
  3. Starfield Update 1.16.236 – April 7, 2026  Bethesda.net
  4. Bethesda Responds to Starfield PS5 Crashing Issues  IGN
  5. Starfield PS5 players demand refunds, reporting widespread bugs and glitches that leave the game "unplayable"  Eurogamer

item.title: Google gives Gemini a productivity boost with synced ‘Notebooks’ - Chrome Unboxed
item.description:
1. Google gives Gemini a productivity boost with synced ‘Notebooks’  Chrome Unboxed
  2. Gemini Gets New Notebooks Feature That Syncs With NotebookLM  CNET
  3. Try notebooks in Gemini to easily keep track of projects  blog.google
  4. I replaced my notes app with Gemini’s new Notebooks — and I’m not going back  Tom's Guide
  5. Gemini app rolling out ‘notebooks’ to organize chats & files, integrates with NotebookLM  9to5Google
